name: cloud-risk-triage-agent-api
description: Autonomous cloud security posture sweep for Tenable Cloud Security via the public GraphQL API with a Bearer API token (no MCP connection). Four sections: Address critical findings, Address low-hanging fruits, Discover AI risk, and Toxic combination (public + critical-VPR-vuln + privileged workloads), mapped to Findings/Entities. Always lists every check, marking empty results.
